DEVELOPMENT.TITLE: Hi! I'm Jorge and I transform ideas into reality.
DEVELOPMENT.MESSAGE:
I'm a developer who believes in **fundamentals**: if I master **Java and Spring Boot**, I can master any language. My focus is efficiency, powered by the best **AI** tools to deliver results in record time.

🚀 **Do you have a technical challenge?** I'm ready to bring my Full Stack experience and accelerated learning capacity to your team.

Let's talk!

HERO.DESCRIPTION: Systems Engineer passionate about building high-impact technological solutions. Specialized in Java/Spring Boot and Angular, with a focus on software architecture and exceptional user experiences.
HERO.DESCRIPTION_POST: efficient and scalable that optimize the user experience.

HOME.TITLE: Full Stack Developer
HOME.SUBTITLE: Transforming ideas into scalable technological solutions

HOME.CTA_PROJECTS_DESC: Explore my full portfolio of projects, from comprehensive mobile apps to robust e-commerce systems and cutting-edge IoT solutions.

ABOUT.P1: As a Systems Engineer, my focus goes beyond writing code; it's about solving complex problems efficiently and scalably. I enjoy every phase of the software lifecycle, from architecture conception to final deployment.
ABOUT.P2_POST: for the frontend, allowing me to build robust, secure, and highly interactive applications. I'm always exploring new technologies, currently deepening my use of AI to optimize development processes.

GATO_FE.TITLE: Front End Software Developer
GATO_FE.DESCRIPTION: Responsible for the maintenance and frontend development of multiple business projects for different clients: accounting ERP, human resources ERP, and management platform for photography studios.

controlate.TITLE: Controlate - Task Management with Gemini AI
controlate.SHORT_DESC: AI-powered Jira/Kanban-style task management platform, optimizing workflow with Gemini.
controlate.DESC: Controlate is an advanced Kanban-style task management platform designed for teams seeking to maximize productivity. It natively integrates the Google Gemini AI API to provide intelligent suggestions, automatic sprint summaries, and predictive workload analysis. Developed with a modern architecture featuring .NET Core 9 for the backend and Angular 20 for a smooth, reactive user experience. It implements critical features such as intuitive drag-and-drop, multi-tenant management, metrics dashboards with Chart.js, and rich text editing with Quill.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Native integration with Google Gemini AI for task optimization and summary generation
HIGHLIGHTS.1: Robust architecture with .NET Core 9 and Angular 20, ensuring high scalability and performance
HIGHLIGHTS.2: Interactive Kanban management system with drag-and-drop using Angular CDK
HIGHLIGHTS.3: Integrated analytical dashboard with Chart.js for productivity monitoring and sprint metrics
HIGHLIGHTS.4: Multi-tenant backend with secure data isolation and clean architecture
HIGHLIGHTS.5: Support for rich content editing with Markdown and Quill
HIGHLIGHTS.6: Full containerization with Docker for agile and consistent deployments

CHALLENGES.0: AI Integration: Asynchronous synchronization of Gemini suggestions without affecting UI latency
CHALLENGES.1: Interactive UX: Implementation of an optimistic drag-and-drop flow for instantaneous user feedback
CHALLENGES.2: Multi-tenant Security: Ensuring strict data isolation between different projects and organizations

codlix.TITLE: CODLIX - Multi-tenant ERP & POS for Restaurants
codlix.SHORT_DESC: SaaS platform with POS, inventory, reservations, cash shifts, and SUNAT electronic invoicing.
codlix.DESC: Codlix is a modular SaaS platform designed for comprehensive restaurant management. It implements Hexagonal Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to ensure full decoupling between business logic and infrastructure. The backend was built with Java 21 and Spring Boot, using Spring Security + JWT for secure authentication in multi-tenant environments. The frontend was developed in Angular with Tailwind CSS, optimized for performance at points of sale (POS). It includes key modules: Inventory Control (Kardex), Point of Sale, Reservation Management, Cash Shift Auditing, Electronic Invoicing with SUNAT, and an analytical Dashboard with ApexCharts.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Hexagonal Architecture (Ports & Adapters) and DDD for full decoupling between business and infrastructure layers
HIGHLIGHTS.1: Multi-tenant ERP system with Java 21 and Spring Boot, managing multiple restaurants from a single platform
HIGHLIGHTS.2: POS module optimized in Angular + Tailwind CSS for real-time order management and table handling
HIGHLIGHTS.3: Electronic invoicing integrated with SUNAT for automated issuance of electronic tax receipts
HIGHLIGHTS.4: Inventory Control (Kardex) with detailed stock movement tracking and category management
HIGHLIGHTS.5: Cash Shift Auditing with strict turn validations and complete financial traceability
HIGHLIGHTS.6: Analytical Dashboard with ApexCharts for real-time sales and performance monitoring

CHALLENGES.0: Multi-tenancy: secure data isolation for different restaurants within PostgreSQL using per-tenant partitioning
CHALLENGES.1: Decoupling: Hexagonal Architecture allowed changing persistence layers without modifying business logic
CHALLENGES.2: Performance: optimization of POS and Dashboard for fluid operation under high request concurrency

1.TITLE: GigaShop - Electronic Products E-commerce Platform
1.SHORT_DESC: Secure e-commerce with online payments, real-time management, and admin panel for electronic products.
1.DESC: In the electronic products trade, many businesses lack a unified platform that allows them to sell online securely, keep inventory updated, and process payments reliably. This limits their sales and reduces customer trust. GigaShop solves this problem with a full-stack e-commerce solution developed in Angular (with Tailwind CSS) and Spring Boot (with Spring Security and JWT). The system includes a user area with secure authentication, persistent cart, and online payments using Stripe; and an admin panel for product management, inventory, and real-time metrics, backed by MySQL. Its architecture follows Clean Code principles and is deployed with Docker, ensuring scalability and maintainability.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Identification and solution of a real e-commerce problem
HIGHLIGHTS.1: Secure authentication with JWT and Spring Security
HIGHLIGHTS.6: Hexagonal architecture and Clean Code principles

2.TITLE: FinanceTracker - Smart Debt and Loan Management
2.SHORT_DESC: Control debts and loans with automatic calculations, reminders, and real-time synchronization.
2.DESC: Many people do not keep precise control of their debts and loans, making it difficult to plan payments and calculate the impact of interest and taxes over time. FinanceTracker solves this problem with a web application developed in React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Firebase, allowing registration of debts, calculation of installments considering interest rates and Sales Tax, and receiving automatic expiration reminders. It offers secure authentication with Google, storage, and real-time synchronization through Firestore, as well as automatic expense categorization for better financial analysis.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Automatic installment calculation with interest and taxes

3.TITLE: Ubícate - Public Transport GPS Tracking
3.SHORT_DESC: Android app to see buses in real-time, calculate arrival times and routes to nearby stops.
3.DESC: Native Android mobile application developed to improve the experience of public transport users through real-time geolocation. Ubicate allows visualizing bus locations on an interactive map, estimating time and distance to a selected stop, and tracing walking routes to reach the nearest point. The solution integrates Google Maps API for route calculation, Firebase for real-time synchronization and data management, and push notifications for important notices. TRAVEL WITH PEACE OF MIND - this mobile application is optimized to provide the best user experience on Android devices, with three main screens: real-time bus location, time and distance calculation to selected stops, and walking routes to nearby stops.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Real-time bus location with high precision
HIGHLIGHTS.1: Calculation of time and distance to selected stops
HIGHLIGHTS.5: TRAVEL WITH PEACE OF MIND - Optimized app
HIGHLIGHTS.6: Three main screens: real-time map, ETA calculations, and pedestrian routes
HIGHLIGHTS.7: Full integration with Google Maps for navigation

CHALLENGES.0: Performance optimization for real-time GPS tracking
CHALLENGES.1: Efficient battery management on Android devices
CHALLENGES.3: Implementation of efficient route calculation algorithms

4.TITLE: ProDent - Medical Schedule and Appointment Management
4.SHORT_DESC: Android app for medical appointment management with history, ratings, and automatic reminders.
4.DESC: Native Android mobile app to facilitate the management of medical appointments for both patients and doctors. Solves the coordination and follow-up problem of appointments, allowing patients to register, view, and manage their reservations, consult their medical history, rate doctors, and leave comments. Doctors can register their available schedules, confirm or reject appointments, and view their schedule on an interactive calendar. Includes push notifications to remind of upcoming appointments and is fully synchronized with Firebase for authentication and cloud data storage.

HIGHLIGHTS.1: Registration and management of medical appointments
HIGHLIGHTS.4: Medical history with details and attached documents

5.TITLE: SecureAuth - Enterprise MFA System
5.SHORT_DESC: MFA authentication system with SSO, auditing, and advanced protection.
5.DESC: Authentication system that implements Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), Single Sign-On (SSO), and granular permission management. Developed with Spring Security, it includes protection against modern attacks, full auditing, and integration with corporate identity services.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: MFA with TOTP, SMS, and biometrics

6.TITLE: RoboControl - Smart IoT System
6.SHORT_DESC: IoT platform with smart robot, advanced sensors, and Android app with Jetpack Compose.
6.DESC: Complete IoT platform combining custom Arduino hardware with an advanced Android application. The robot includes smart sensors, programmable actuators, basic computer vision, and dual connectivity (WiFi/Bluetooth). The app uses Jetpack Compose with reactive architecture for real-time control and routine programming.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Custom firmware with FreeRTOS for multitasking

7.TITLE: UBICATE - Transport Management and Real-Time Geolocation
7.SHORT_DESC: Angular + Firebase platform for bus tracking and transport management.
7.DESC: UBICATE is a platform that allows users and drivers to visualize bus locations in real-time, consult ETA and routes on interactive maps. The backend implements Spring Security with JWT for authentication/roles and persists operational data in MySQL (drivers, buses, routes, companies). Locations are published and consumed in real-time from Firebase/Firestore for low latency in tracking. The solution integrates Google Maps for route and geofence tracing, and push notifications for critical alerts.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Spring Boot backend with Spring Security (JWT, roles, and permissions)
HIGHLIGHTS.1: Operational persistence in MySQL (drivers, buses, routes, companies)
HIGHLIGHTS.3: Enterprise panel for driver, route, and fleet management
HIGHLIGHTS.4: Interactive maps with Google Maps and geofencing
HIGHLIGHTS.5: Push notifications for events and user alerts

CHALLENGES.0: Performance optimization with large volume of locations
CHALLENGES.2: Definition of security rules in Firebase

8.TITLE: Polule Ice - Sales and Inventory System
8.SHORT_DESC: Comprehensive sales and inventory system with JWT authentication, automatic reports, and role management.
8.DESC: Comprehensive sales and inventory management system developed as a freelance project. The application implements secure authentication with JWT and Spring Security, allowing the administration of two different roles: Administrator and Seller. The system offers a complete administrative panel for real-time inventory management, sales control, and generation of daily, weekly, and monthly reports. Developed with Angular on the frontend and Spring Boot on the backend, it uses MySQL as a database to guarantee the persistence and reliability of information. The architecture allows business scaling with features such as stock control, low inventory alerts, transaction history, and sales analysis.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Secure authentication with JWT and Spring Security

9.TITLE: MsgService - Event-Driven Notifier with RabbitMQ
9.SHORT_DESC: Event-oriented microservice for user management and automated notifications.
9.DESC: Robust backend system developed with Java and Spring Boot implementing an Event-Driven Architecture (EDA). It utilizes RabbitMQ as a message broker to decouple processes and manage notifications asynchronously. The solution includes a REST API for user administration, data validation, persistence with JPA/H2, and an integrated email system using Spring Mail. The entire environment is containerized with Docker and orchestrated with Docker Compose.

HIGHLIGHTS.2: Robust REST API with data validation (Jakarta)
HIGHLIGHTS.3: Full containerization with Docker and Docker Compose
HIGHLIGHTS.4: Data persistence with Spring Data JPA

lumina.TITLE: Lumina: Cycle & Adherence Control 🌙💊
lumina.SHORT_DESC: Mobile app for menstrual cycle tracking and pill adherence through an emotional and visual system.
lumina.DESC: Lumina is a mobile application developed in Flutter designed to help users maintain precise control over their menstrual cycle and, most importantly, ensure adherence to contraceptive pill taking through an emotional and visual system. It includes a flexible 'Virtual Pill Pack' (21, 28, 30 days), an interactive emotional companion whose mascot reflects your punctuality, and an Android home screen widget with instant synchronization. The application follows Hexagonal Architecture (Clean Architecture) principles to separate business logic from infrastructure and uses SQLite to guarantee total data privacy locally.

HIGHLIGHTS.0: Interactive Virtual Pill Pack with future day locking to avoid confusion
HIGHLIGHTS.1: Emotional Companion: Interactive mascot with dynamic states based on punctuality
HIGHLIGHTS.2: Android Home Screen Widget with instant updates
HIGHLIGHTS.3: Intelligent cycle prediction based on historical logs
HIGHLIGHTS.4: Hexagonal Architecture (Clean Architecture) with Flutter and Provider for state management
HIGHLIGHTS.5: Local persistence with SQLite for maximum privacy protection

CHALLENGES.0: Implementing pure business logic in the Domain layer for maximum maintainability
CHALLENGES.1: Bi-directional state synchronization between the Flutter app and the native Android widget
CHALLENGES.2: Designing a fluid interface with dynamic animations for the emotional mascot
